news.title:
Taj GVK Hotels faces VAT demand post Telangana tribunal's dismissal of appeal.
Liability includes Rs.6.7L for Taj Krishna and Rs.2.4L for Taj Deccan hotels.
news.summary:
Taj GVK Hotels faces VAT demand post Telangana tribunal's dismissal of appeal.
Liability includes Rs.6.7L for Taj Krishna and Rs.2.4L for Taj Deccan hotels.

news.title:
Taj GVK Hotels' Dec 2025 net sales rose 7.4% Y-o-Y to Rs 136.4 crore.
Net profit fell 14.2% to Rs 29.1 crore; EPS decreased to Rs 4.64 from Rs 5.40.
news.summary:
Taj GVK Hotels' Dec 2025 net sales rose 7.4% Y-o-Y to Rs 136.4 crore.
Net profit fell 14.2% to Rs 29.1 crore; EPS decreased to Rs 4.64 from Rs 5.40.

news.title:
Indian Hotels reclassified from promoter to public shareholder after selling 25.5% stake in Taj GVK.
IHCL retains no control or special rights post sale; SEBI board approved reclassification.
news.summary:
Indian Hotels reclassified from promoter to public shareholder after selling 25.5% stake in Taj GVK.
IHCL retains no control or special rights post sale; SEBI board approved reclassification.

news.title:
Taj GVK Q3 revenue rose 8% YoY to ₹138Cr, PAT fell to ₹29Cr due to one-time expenses.
9M revenue up 13.6% to ₹376Cr; PAT grew 35% to ₹89Cr. JV's Taj Santacruz Q3 revenue ₹67Cr, PAT ₹16Cr.
news.summary:
Taj GVK Q3 revenue rose 8% YoY to ₹138Cr, PAT fell to ₹29Cr due to one-time expenses.
9M revenue up 13.6% to ₹376Cr; PAT grew 35% to ₹89Cr. JV's Taj Santacruz Q3 revenue ₹67Cr, PAT ₹16Cr.

news.title:
Taj Gvk Hotels acquired 2.01% additional shares in JV Green Woods for Rs.16.1 Cr.
Stake rises to 51%, making it a subsidiary; JV operates Taj Santacruz, FY25 turnover Rs.231.8 Cr.
news.summary:
Taj Gvk Hotels acquired 2.01% additional shares in JV Green Woods for Rs.16.1 Cr.
Stake rises to 51%, making it a subsidiary; JV operates Taj Santacruz, FY25 turnover Rs.231.8 Cr.

news.title: TajGVK Hotels reported Q3 revenue of 1.36B Rupees, up from 1.26B YoY.
news.summary: TajGVK Hotels reported Q3 revenue of 1.36B Rupees, up from 1.26B YoY.

news.title:
TAJGVK Hotels faces a GST demand of Rs. 17.5 lakh and penalty of Rs. 1.9 lakh for FY 2021-22.
The demand is linked to excess ITC, ineligible ITC claims, and reconciliation discrepancies; appeal is being filed.
news.summary:
TAJGVK Hotels faces a GST demand of Rs. 17.5 lakh and penalty of Rs. 1.9 lakh for FY 2021-22.
The demand is linked to excess ITC, ineligible ITC claims, and reconciliation discrepancies; appeal is being filed.

news.title:
Promoter group entities, MOONSHOT TRUST and STARLIGHT TRUST, sold 1.25M equity shares each of Taj GVK Hotels & Resorts Ltd on 30 Dec 2025 via open market.
The disclosure was made per SEBI regulations. Details are provided in the attached Form C for information and records.
news.summary:
Promoter group entities, MOONSHOT TRUST and STARLIGHT TRUST, sold 1.25M equity shares each of Taj GVK Hotels & Resorts Ltd on 30 Dec 2025 via open market.
The disclosure was made per SEBI regulations. Details are provided in the attached Form C for information and records.

news.title: Promoters of Taj GVK Hotels & Resorts must disclose encumbrance reasons under SEBI regulations.
news.summary: Promoters of Taj GVK Hotels & Resorts must disclose encumbrance reasons under SEBI regulations.

news.title:
IHCL sold 25.5% shares of Taj GVK off-market, exiting completely.
IHCL requested reclassification from Promoter to Public category.
news.summary:
IHCL sold 25.5% shares of Taj GVK off-market, exiting completely.
IHCL requested reclassification from Promoter to Public category.

news.title:
Taj Gvk Hotels' promoters pledged shares as security for a Rs. 250 crore loan.
Pledge created in favor of 360 ONE PRIME Limited per SEBI rules on 30 Dec 2025.
news.summary:
Taj Gvk Hotels' promoters pledged shares as security for a Rs. 250 crore loan.
Pledge created in favor of 360 ONE PRIME Limited per SEBI rules on 30 Dec 2025.

news.title:
Taj Gvk Hotels' MD acquired 25.5% stake via promoter group transfer.
The inter-se transfer involved 1.6 crore shares under SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Taj Gvk Hotels' MD acquired 25.5% stake via promoter group transfer.
The inter-se transfer involved 1.6 crore shares under SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Ms. Shalini Bhupal acquired 25.52 shares from IHCL; agreements terminated.
IHCL directors resigned, and 'Taj' will be removed from the company's name.
news.summary:
Ms. Shalini Bhupal acquired 25.52 shares from IHCL; agreements terminated.
IHCL directors resigned, and 'Taj' will be removed from the company's name.

news.title:
IHCL sold its 25.52% stake in Taj GVK to GVK Bhupal family.
GVK Bhupal family now holds 74.99% stake; IHCL to manage 6 hotels and new Bengaluru property.
news.summary:
IHCL sold its 25.52% stake in Taj GVK to GVK Bhupal family.
GVK Bhupal family now holds 74.99% stake; IHCL to manage 6 hotels and new Bengaluru property.

news.title:
TajGVK reports 13.7% profit rise to Rs 27.55 crore in Q2 FY25.
Sales grew 1.9% to Rs 107.18 crore compared to Q2 FY24.
news.summary:
TajGVK reports 13.7% profit rise to Rs 27.55 crore in Q2 FY25.
Sales grew 1.9% to Rs 107.18 crore compared to Q2 FY24.

news.title:
Taj GVK Hotels reports total assets of Rs.96,720 lakhs as of Sept 2025.
Equity stands at Rs.69,088 lakhs; liabilities split into Rs.13,259 lakhs (non-current) and Rs.14,373 lakhs (current).
news.summary:
Taj GVK Hotels reports total assets of Rs.96,720 lakhs as of Sept 2025.
Equity stands at Rs.69,088 lakhs; liabilities split into Rs.13,259 lakhs (non-current) and Rs.14,373 lakhs (current).

news.title:
TAJGVK Hotels Q2 EBITDA rises to 336M INR vs 295M YoY, indicating growth.
EBITDA margin improves to 31.4% from 28%, showing operational efficiency.
news.summary:
TAJGVK Hotels Q2 EBITDA rises to 336M INR vs 295M YoY, indicating growth.
EBITDA margin improves to 31.4% from 28%, showing operational efficiency.
